name: ♪ Maple - yttd
description: 🥞🍁Maple is a young, sensitive woman in her 20s or so. I couldn't come up with a good POV for her. However, this is a daily life AU and Maple is a human, not a robot. And the character is not changed. the first message does not contain anyone other than her, as for any Pov. I didn't find a single bot with Maple, sad! so i will fix it.
